chunks.title: Call to Return and Promise of Healing
chunks.reason: A unified call for the people to return to God with promises of restoration.

chunks.title: Judgment on Ephraim and Judah
chunks.reason: God's rhetorical questions and declaration of judgment against the people's fleeting faithfulness.

chunks.title: Specific Iniquities in Gilead and Shechem
chunks.reason: Concrete examples of wickedness involving cities, priests, and the house of Israel.

chunks.title: Harvest Set for Judah
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle addressing Judah regarding the coming harvest and restoration.
